samples.source_path: D:\CorpusTransfr\verified\IGS\10.0 Program Management\#GSA_OASIS\DIDs\CDRL DIDs\A004--DD250\DI-SESS-82293.pdf
samples.text:
DATA ITEM DESCRIPTION 
Title: MATERIAL INSPECTION AND RECEIVING REPORT (DD FORM 250) 
 
Number: DI-SESS-82293 Approval Date: 20190919 
AMSC Number: N10096 Limitation: N/A 
DTIC Applicable: No GIDEP Applicable: No 
Preparing Activity: AS Project Number: SESS-2019-051 
Applicable Forms: DD Form 250 
 
Use/Relationship: The Material Inspection and Receiving Report (DD Form 250) provides a 
contractual delivery mechanism for separate and distinct deliverables (separately or not 
separately priced). Copies of DD Form 250 can be obtained at:  
https://www.esd.whs.mil/Directives/forms/.  It is intended to document the inspection, 
acceptance, receipt and delivery of the service or product. 
 
This Data Item Description (DID) contains the format, content and intended information for the 
data product resulting from the work task described in the contract statement of work (SOW). 
 
Requirements: 
 
1. Reference Documents. The applicable issue of the documents cited herein, including their 
approval dates and dates of any applicable amendments, notices, and revisions shall be as 
specified in the contract. 
 
2. Format.

samples.source_path: D:\CorpusTransfr\verified\IGS\10.0 Program Management\#GSA_OASIS\DIDs\CDRL DIDs\A004--DD250\DI-SESS-82293.pdf
samples.text:
he applicable issue of the documents cited herein, including their 
approval dates and dates of any applicable amendments, notices, and revisions shall be as 
specified in the contract. 
 
2. Format. The Material Inspection And Receiving Report (DD Form 250) shall be formatted. in 
accordance with DD Form 250 and shall be provided in Adobe Acrobat Portable Data Format 
(PDF). Refer to DD Form 250 Instructions for guidance to complete the form. 
 
3. Content. The Material Inspection and Receiving Report (DD Form 250) shall contain the data 
appearing on the DD Form 250 Instructions to include digital signatures. 
 
 
 
End of DI-SESS-82293
